summary.key_theme: 華爾街分析師普遍看好 Cloudflare 在 AI 與資安領域的成長潛力，並紛紛上調目標價，儘管市場對其高估值與裁員帶來的營運不確定性仍有擔憂。

bullish.title: BTIG Maintains Buy on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $314
bullish.reason: 分析師 Gray Powell 將目標價從 $269 大幅上調至 $314，顯示對公司長期成長動能的高度信心。

bullish.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $300
bullish.reason: 分析師 Shaul Eyal 維持買入評級並上調目標價至 $300，反映市場對其 AI 相關業務的強勁預期。

bullish.title: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $300
bullish.reason: 分析師 Saket Kalia 將目標價從 $250 上調至 $300，顯示機構投資人對其市場份額擴張的認可。

bullish.title: Cloudflare (NET) Stock Gets Fair Value Boost As Analysts Raise AI And Security Targets
bullish.reason: 綜合報導指出分析師普遍調升 AI 與資安業務的估值，支撐股價上漲動能。

bullish.title: Cloudflare (NET) Launches Precursor To Take On More Sophisticated Bot Attacks
bullish.reason: 推出 Precursor 新產品以應對更複雜的機器人攻擊，強化了公司在資安領域的技術護城河。

bullish.title: Are You Looking for a Top Momentum Pick? Why Cloudflare (NET) is a Great Choice
bullish.reason: 被列為頂級動能選股，吸引技術面交易者的關注。

bullish.title: Cloudflare (NET): 3 Reasons We Love This Stock
bullish.reason: 分析師列舉三個看好理由，強化投資人對公司基本面的信心。

bullish.title: $1000 Invested In Cloudflare 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
bullish.reason: 回顧過去 5 年表現優於大盤 8.61%，展現長期成長實力。

bearish.title: Cloudflare: Valuation Is Now A Real Issue
bearish.reason: 儘管營收成長強勁，但 20% 的裁員引發營運不確定性，且當前估值過高，風險回報比不佳。

bearish.title: Cloudflare (NET) Stock May Be Fully Priced As AI Search News Lifts Hopes
bearish.reason: 市場對 AI 搜尋題材過度樂觀，可能導致股價已充分反映利多，短期上漲空間有限。

neutral.title: Oracle Just Cratered 33% in a Month. Is It Time to Switch to Cloudflare or CoreWeave?
neutral.reason: 探討資金輪動的可能性，將 Cloudflare 作為 Oracle 的替代標的進行比較，未給出明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: CRWD, PANW, NET, ZS: One Cybersecurity Stock Won Over Retail Investors – But Another Tops Wall Street’s List
neutral.reason: 比較資安板塊內不同公司的投資人偏好，屬於產業觀察性質。

neutral.title: Cloudflare (NET) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
neutral.reason: 單純報導股價上漲現象與背景資訊，無明顯多空立場。
